options.label: A
options.value: 当 $r < s$ 时，向量组 $\mathrm{II}$ 必线性相关.

options.label: B
options.value: 当 $r > s$ 时，向量组 $\mathrm{II}$ 必线性相关.

options.label: C
options.value: 当 $r < s$ 时，向量组 $\mathrm{I}$ 必线性相关.

options.label: D
options.value: 当 $r > s$ 时，向量组 $\mathrm{I}$ 必线性相关.

corrections.reason: PDF page 3 visually states that the r<s counterexample makes group II linearly independent and eliminates A/C; the r>s counterexample makes group II linearly independent and eliminates B; D is selected. Paper OCR distinguishes group II in A/B from group I in C/D. Together these facts uniquely determine the four options.

The visual solution formula uses the triple integral over the ball Omega(t); the current stem combines a double integral over D(t) with dv and is inconsistent with both the defined region and the derivation.
The PDF embedded formula image visibly contains the three-entry column vector (1,1,1)^T.
PDF page 11 visually shows the substitution 2n(x-theta)=t followed by the integral from zero to infinity. OCR incorrectly merged the substitution annotation and lower bound into a fraction.

corrections.appendText:
（1）设 $y=f(x)$ 可导且 $f'(x)\neq 0$，则 $y=f(x)$ 存在反函数 $x=g(y)$，$x=g(y)$ 可导且

$$
g'(y)=\frac{1}{f'(x)}.
$$

（2）设 $y=f(x)$ 二阶可导且 $f'(x)\neq 0$，则 $y=f(x)$ 存在反函数 $x=g(y)$，$x=g(y)$ 二阶可导且

$$
g''(y)=\frac{\mathrm{d}[g'(y)]}{\mathrm{d}y}=\frac{\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}x}\left[\frac{1}{f'(x)}\right]}{\frac{\mathrm{d}y}{\mathrm{d}x}}=\frac{\left[\frac{1}{f'(x)}\right]'}{f'(x)}=-\frac{f''(x)}{[f'(x)]^3}.
$$
corrections.reason: The staging explanation stops immediately after '有如下两点：'. PDF page 6 visibly contains both numbered inverse-function derivative identities before Q18 starts. Source markdown lines 284-285 preserve the same prose but corrupt the second formula; the visual formula confirms the negative sign and denominator [f'(x)]^3.

corrections.appendText:
（1）设 $A\pmb{\alpha}=\lambda_0\pmb{\alpha}$，则

$$
f(A)\pmb{\alpha}=f(\lambda_0)\pmb{\alpha}.
$$

特别地，若 $A$ 可逆，则

$$
A^{-1}\pmb{\alpha}=\frac{1}{\lambda_0}\pmb{\alpha},\qquad A^*\pmb{\alpha}=\frac{|A|}{\lambda_0}\pmb{\alpha},
$$

即 $A$ 与 $A^{-1},A^*$ 的特征向量相同。

（2）设 $A\pmb{\alpha}=\lambda_0\pmb{\alpha}$ 且 $P^{-1}AP=B$，则

$$
B\cdot P^{-1}\pmb{\alpha}=\lambda_0P^{-1}\pmb{\alpha},
$$

即 $A$ 与 $B$ 的特征值相同，$B$ 的属于特征值 $\lambda_0$ 的特征向量为 $P^{-1}\pmb{\alpha}$。
corrections.reason: The staging explanation stops at '主要有如下结论：'. Source markdown lines 379-383 contain two complete conclusions. PDF page 9 and its embedded formula images visually confirm the formulas; Q20 starts after them.

boundaries: Do not modify the read-only source repository.
Do not infer additional visual corrections beyond this evidence file.
Q22's printed F(x) derivation reuses x as the dummy variable; this evidence pass does not require normalizing that stylistic issue.
